title: saxifraga integrifolia var. fragosa
intro: Saxifraga integrifolia var. fragosa is a plant species commonly known as the 'Rock Saxifrage' or 'Fragrant Saxifrage', belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include soothing irritated mucous membranes, reducing inflammation, and promoting a healthy immune system. Saxifraga integrifolia var. fragosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
